introSection: Creek Freak was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Millsprings Amusement Park in Paducah, Kentucky, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride seems to have been build by the Allan Herschell Company when judging by photo's, but this isn't confirmed.

fullText:
Creek Freak was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Millsprings Amusement Park in Paducah, Kentucky, USA.

The ride seems to have been build by the Allan Herschell Company when judging by photo's, but this isn't confirmed.

Yellow track and supports.
